name: The Trick of Life and Love
overview: When you happen to save the man that annoyed you the most and he wakes up with amnesia, what kind of love-hate relationship will it bring? Domineering CEO Ning Cheng Ming has a reputation for being a professor from hell. After a mysterious car accident, he is saved by Li Qian, a person that he hasn't seen in years. They were enemies. She was a witty student and now an all-around secretary

trailers.title: 【精彩预告】赘婿谋爱篇：精彩！千金大小姐为男人互扯头花？《机智的恋爱生活 The Trick of Life and Love》第1集【芒果TV青春剧场】
